metadata.title: Magnetic Helicity Functional Correction
metadata.loc_class: QC - Physics: plasma and electromagnetic fields
metadata.creator: Daniel Alexander Trawin

master_row.title: Magnetic Helicity Functional Correction
master_row.canonical_statement: \begin{theorem}[Confinement Scaling] The confinement time $\tau_c$ scales as: \begin{equation} \tau_c \sim \frac{R^2}{\chi_\perp} \left(\frac{B_{\text{toroidal}}}{B_{\text{poloidal}}}\right)^2 \exp\left(\frac{\mathcal{H}_M}{k_B T}\right) \end{equation} where helicity $\mathcal{H}_M$ provides exponential enhancement. \end{theorem}
master_row.formation_inputs: c, R, B_, H, M, k_B
master_row.formation_note: Recovered from a D:\All source document under ‘Physical Realization Categories’.
master_row.dictionary: Magnetic Helicity Functional Correction — τ_c ∼ (R^2)/(χ_perp) (fracB_toroidalB_poloidal )^2 exp ((H_M)/(k_B T) )
master_row.encyclopedia: The entry preserves the equation exactly as extracted from `00AllEdit\analysis_all_edit_focus_11_22\output\all_edit_equation_arc_compact.csv` for registry alignment and later derivation.
